title: Continuous Internal Evaluation (CIE) Cycle in Machine Learning
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of continuously evaluating and improving a machine learning model internally, separate from final user-facing validation.
relationships: An iterative cycle where the model is trained, evaluated on a held-out internal test set, analyzed for weaknesses, adjusted/retrained based on the analysis, and then the updated model re-enters the cycle for further evaluation.
